diagram_title: AI self-observes current quota via MCP

activities.label: LLM initiates quota self-check
activities.description: Subagent / 主 agent 在 tool-call 之間決定主動查當前用量，呼叫 get_my_current_usage（無參數）
inputs: LLM context signals (task length, recent tool burst, perceived slowness)
outputs: MCP tool call request {name: get_my_current_usage, args: {}}
controls: DD-6: description 含使用時機提示

activities.label: Bridge injects sessionID into tool args
activities.description: opencode MCP bridge 在呼叫 client.callTool 前把當前執行 session 的 sessionID 併入 args
controls: DD-2: bridge 注入，LLM 不需知道
R-1: 若取不到 sessionID，args 保持原樣，tool 走 unsupported 分支

activities.label: Resolve session's pinned execution identity
activities.description: MCP tool handler 依 sessionID 讀 session info.json 的 execution.accountId

activities.label: Dispatch to provider's quota probe
activities.description: AccountQuotaProbe registry 依 providerId 取出對應實作；codex/openai 有實作，其他回 unsupported

activities.label: Serve from cache or refresh
activities.description: Codex probe 先查 quota-cache.json；ageSeconds <= TTL 回 cached，否則 fetch live API 並寫回
controls: R-2: key by accountId 避免切號污染

activities.label: Respond with usage + freshness metadata
activities.description: Tool 回傳 {supported, provider, family, accountId, usage, cachedAt, ageSeconds}，LLM 看 ageSeconds 自己判斷資料新鮮度
outputs: LLM context contains fresh quota snapshot
controls: 禁止靜默 fallback（unsupported 不偽裝成空值）
